explanations.VPC: Provides network isolation and security boundaries for core services.
explanations.Application Load Balancer: Distributes incoming traffic across backend containers and improves availability.
explanations.RDS: Provides managed relational storage for transactional and application data. For high-scale workloads, deploy with high availability and read replicas where needed.
explanations.S3: Stores static assets, logs, and user-uploaded objects with high durability.
explanations.CloudFront: Reduces global latency by caching content at edge locations. This supports global user access with lower response times.
explanations.ECS Service: Runs containerized backend APIs with managed orchestration.
explanations.ElastiCache: Improves read performance and reduces database load via in-memory caching. Useful for conversational context/session caching in AI chatbot backends.
explanations.SQS: Decouples asynchronous workloads and smooths traffic spikes. This helps absorb burst traffic from inference requests.
explanations.Auto Scaling: Automatically increases or decreases service instances based on demand. Target scale: about 1,000,000 users.
